step.title: Finalize and Handoff
step.goal: All sections drafted. Stamp last_updated with final state. Re-validate. Recommend ticket-verify.

substep.title: Verify All Sections Written
substep.action:
Compare {{written_sections}} to {{writing_plan.writing_order}}. Every section in the writing_order list should be in written_sections.
If any section was skipped (perhaps due to a pause that wasn't resumed), halt and surface: "Section X was not written. Re-invoke ticket-write to complete the remaining sections before proceeding to ticket-verify."

substep.title: Final last_updated Stamp
substep.action: uv run {base_dir}/scripts/stamp-frontmatter.py --file "{{ticket_path}}" --note "I-phase complete. All {{total_sections}} sections drafted. Final length: {{actual_lines}} lines (estimated: {{total_estimate}}). Ready for ticket-verify."

substep.title: Present Final Handoff
substep.template-output:
Write phase complete. Bundle ready for Verify.
**Ticket file**: {{ticket_path}} **Final length**: {{actual_lines}} lines (estimated: {{total_estimate}}; deviation: {{percent}}) **Subagent dispatches performed**: {{dispatch_count}} **Checkpoints triggered**: {{checkpoint_count}}
**Status**: draft (will transition to 'ready' at end of ticket-verify if verification passes)
**Next action**: invoke `ticket-verify` from the ticketsmith menu (cmd: TV) for the V-phase: - Self-review against the AGENT-BRIEF principles - Reviewer subagent dispatch (for tags feature / exploration / infrastructure) - Severity-classified findings - Inline fixes (with user approval for ambiguous ones) - draft → ready transition (final user-gated checkpoint)

section.title: Length deviation flag
section.description:
If actual_lines deviates from total_estimate by >50% (either under or over), surface this in the handoff. Under: sections may have been written too thin; ticket-verify will check for missing content. Over: sections may have scope crept; ticket-verify will check for content that belongs elsewhere.
Mild deviation (<25%) is normal and not flagged.

section.title: Status discipline
section.description: ticket-write does NOT change status. The ticket remains 'draft' throughout this skill. Status transitions only happen in ticket-verify's final substep, gated by user approval.
